design_philosophy: Classic editorial style inspired by Bring a Trailer. Focus on high-quality photography, generous white space, and typographic hierarchy. Clean, trustworthy, and premium.

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton with 1px borders (border-zinc-200) for a technical, editorial look. No soft shadows. Cards are flat.

navigation.style: Solid white background, sticky top, z-50, border-b border-border. Clean typographic links.

hero.style: Editorial split layout or large featured image with a clean, semi-transparent text box. H1 in Playfair Display.

car_card.style: Flat, 1px border border-border, large 16:9 image on top, p-4 or p-6 for content. Playfair Display for Car Title. Grid of specs below title.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors

bid_section.style: High contrast box (bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 p-6), prominent current bid in Euro with Leva conversion, large input and Place Bid button.

motion.hover: Subtle image scale up (transform scale-105) on car cards. Transition transform 0.4s ease.
motion.page_load: Fade in content sequentially. Staggered entrance for car grids.

hero.description: Blue Audi A8 on dirt road, suitable for hero or featured car

how_it_works.description: Silver car driving on city street

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React frontend with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI primitives. DO NOT USE NEXT.JS APP ROUTER IF ENVIRONMENT IS REACT SPA. Check environment first.
The style must be 'Classic Editorial' (Archetype 4) - similar to Bring a Trailer.
The application content and UI must be entirely in Bulgarian.
Ensure global layout has a sticky navigation bar with 'autobids.bg' text logo, and links: Търгове, Как работи, Продай автомобил, Вход.
Hero Section: Split layout or large cover image, large 'Playfair Display' heading ('Открийте и наддавайте за изключителни автомобили').
Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or bento box grid for the live active auctions.

For the car cards, include specs: година (year), модел (model), пробег (mileage), двигател (engine), локация (location: София, Пловдив, Варна, etc.), and show current bid in both Euros (€) and Leva (лв.).
Create a detailed Auction Page: Photo gallery (large main image, thumbnails below), Specs table, Bid History, Comment Section, and a sticky Bid Box on the right.
Create an interactive browse/filters page with filters on the left and car grid on the right.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on all key interactive elements.
Do NOT use soft shadows (shadow-lg, etc.). Use sharp 1px borders (border-zinc-200) to separate components, keeping it flat and editorial.
Ensure 'Playfair Display' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are used from Google Fonts.
